name: Crab Game 2
short_description: Crab Game 2 is a multiplayer PvP game with up to 25 players where you have to survive different mini games to be the last one standing.
detailed_description: Step into crab game 2, a multiplayer competition where you have to complete with up to 25 other players, play new and exciting mini games to be the last person standing. These mini games are designed to push your sanity and your friendships to the limit. From parkour to "skillful" chance, each round offers a fresh test of your abilities and well, luck. With these challenges and an unpredictable playing field, each game will provide a different experience and different kind of fun. Prove you have what it takes to outlast everyone else and win in Crab Game 2.
